notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil singles on a line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Shea Langeliers scores. Carlos Cortes to 3rd. Fielding error by center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy reaches on a throwing error by shortstop J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Austin Wynns out at 2nd. Shea Langeliers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor singles on a line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Cal Raleigh scores. Julio Rodríguez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver pinch-hit
